recent_coach_change: Pochettino appointed September 2024, replacing interim Mikey Varas after Gregg Berhalter's departure following Copa America 2024; no change in the last 12 months.
base_formation: Back three (3-4-2-1 / 3-4-3 variants tested through qualifying and friendlies)
qualification_path: Automatic qualification as co-host (USA, Canada, Mexico host the 2026 World Cup).
key_players: Christian Pulisic (AC Milan) — talisman captain, 84 caps and 32 goals, strong Serie A season
Weston McKennie (Juventus) — versatile midfield engine, regular for Juventus
Folarin Balogun (Monaco) — first-choice striker option after Ligue 1 spell
Antonee Robinson (Fulham) — attacking left-back, established Premier League starter
Gio Reyna (Borussia Monchengladbach) — included after move to Gladbach revived form

injuries_doubts.issue: high-grade right ankle sprain requiring surgery
two torn ankle ligaments suffered vs Brentford on May 17; training individually, not yet match-fit
injury ruling him out of the World Cup

squad_notes: Pochettino named a 26-man roster on May 26, 2026, in New York. Gio Reyna and Joe Scally (both Borussia Monchengladbach) and Club America's Alejandro Zendejas were notable inclusions; Real Salt Lake's Diego Luna was a surprise omission, along with Tanner Tessmann and Aidan Morris, leaving Tyler Adams as the lone specialist defensive midfielder. 13 players are first-time World Cup participants; 13 returnees from 2022. All three goalkeepers are MLS-based.
warmup_assessment: Mixed final tune-ups. The USA lost 2-1 to Germany at Soldier Field on June 6, 2026 (Mark McKenzie deputizing for the injured Richards), with earlier 2026 friendlies producing varied results; performances suggested unsettled defensive personnel due to injuries.
shape_verdict: A talented host nation with its strongest attacking core (Pulisic, McKennie, Balogun) but unsettled at defensive midfield after losing Cardoso and with Richards a fitness doubt at center-back. Tactically still flexible under Pochettino but not yet convincingly cohesive.

news.headline: Pochettino names 26-man USMNT World Cup roster; Gio Reyna in, Diego Luna out
Chris Richards suffers two torn ankle ligaments vs Brentford, casting World Cup doubt
USMNT fall 2-1 to Germany at Soldier Field in final pre-World Cup friendly
Johnny Cardoso to undergo ankle surgery, ruled out of World Cup
